_comment: IGEL OS 12 app-recipe metadata (igelpkg). Submission rules (App Creator Portal): 'version' MUST be a valid SemVer; 'public_version' MUST be empty or absent (kept ABSENT here). Field set grounded on the IGEL-Community recipes; the full authoritative schema stays 待核实 vs the IGEL SDK Reference Manual. See ../README.md for the recommended Managed-Container submission path.
